description.unified: Restores HP equal to 10% of Max HP to the 4 allies with the lowest HP, and additionally restores ATK HP every 1sec for [8 sec->10sec]. This effect cannot be dispelled.
Removes all harmful effects from all allies and increases their Magic DEF for [20 sec->15sec].
Deals Magic DMG to enemies within range 10 time, and reduces their ATK Spd by [25%->10%] for [ (added) 10sec].
Every [7 sec->8sec], restores [1 orb of mana->1000 Mana] and ATK HP to 1 ally with the lowest HP.

IV.unified: Increases Mana Recovery per sec of the target by [50%->15%].
Increases CC Resist by [250->120] for [20 sec->15 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], and the effect now applies to all allies.
Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10%.

dark.unified: Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 10%.
Additionally restores [1 orb of mana->500 Mana] to the [ (added) 2] allies with the lowest HP [ (removed) highest ATK].

description.unified: [Soulrush] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and heals all allies' HP by {0}% of DMG.

dark.unified: All allies’ Mana recovery per second increases by 30%, and your cooldown of all skills is reduced by 5%.

description.unified: Every 20 sec, puts the 2 allies with the lowest HP into Spirit Form for {0} sec. Allies in Spirit Form are immune to physical attacks, their HP cannot be reduced below 1%, and their Mana recovery per second is increased by [ (added) 35%].
